debug_info.goal:
Ident : Type u_1
Typ : Type u_2
inst✝ : DecidableEq Ident
ε : Env Ident Typ
e : ExprLow Ident Typ
⊢ @Graphiti.ExprLow.well_formed Ident Typ ε inst✝ e = true → well_typed ε e → well_typed' ε e

failed_attempts:
apply hkey hchk1 hb
    apply hkey hchk2 hb

hb; subst_vars
    constructor
    · rfl
    · constructor; assumption
      exists T

T; and_intros
    · have ⟨mod, hmod, hmi_eq⟩ := build_module_build_module_interface' hmi
      simp [build_module_interface'] at hb
      rw [hmod] at hb; simp at hb; cases hb; subst mi
      rwa [hmi_eq] at hf1
    · have ⟨mod, hmod, hmi_eq⟩ := build_module_build_module_interface' hmi
      simp [build_module_interface'] at hb
      rw [hmod] at hb; simp at hb; cases hb; subst mi
      rwa [hmi_eq] at hf2

hwf hwt.1 hbuild hf1 hbuild'
    · apply build_module_interface_build_module_interface' hwf hwt.1 hbuild hf2 hbuild'

mi'; and_intros; rfl
    · exists T; and_intros
      · apply build_module_interface_build_module_interface' <;> try assumption; exact hwt_e.1
      · apply build_module_interface_build_module_interface' <;> try assumption; exact hwt_e.1

imp
    have : mi = mi' := by
      -- build_module_interface and build_module_interface' are equivalent
      -- for well_formed expressions.
      rw [←Option.some_inj, ←hb, ←hbuild]
      sorry
    subst mi'
    constructor
    · simp [ModuleInterface.connect', hf1, hf2]
      rw [Batteries.AssocList.contains_iff_exists, Batteries.AssocList.contains_iff_exists]
      simp [hf1, hf2]
    · assumption

mi; simp
    dsimp [well_typed, build_module_interface] at hwt
    cases h : build_module_interface ε e <;> rw [h] at hwt
    contradiction
    dsimp at hwt; obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hwt
    constructor <;> assumption

T
    constructor
    apply build_module_interface_build_module_interface' <;> try assumption
    exact hwt_e.1
    exact hf1
    apply build_module_interface_build_module_interface' <;> try assumption
    exact hwt_e.1
    exact hf2

T; and_intros
    <;> apply build_module_interface_build_module_interface' <;> try assumption
    <;> solve_by_elim

[hb] at hbuild'
    subst mi'
    simp [heq] at *
    constructor <;> assumption

T; and_intros
      · rfl
      · dsimp [build_module_interface, build_module_interface', Module.toModuleInterface] at *
        rw [hbuild] at hbuild'; cases hbuild'
        assumption
      · dsimp [build_module_interface, build_module_interface', Module.toModuleInterface] at *
        rw [hbuild] at hbuild'; cases hbuild'
        assumption
    · exact wt_e'
